overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking along a dirt path through rural prairie. The character encounters mounted riders passing by and continues toward a distant farmstead under dramatic cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with rocky outcropping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through grassy prairie with wildflowers

entered.detail: large gray rock formation with layered stone slabs on the right side of the path
single tall green tree with broad canopy beside the trail
worn brown dirt path cutting through green grass
grassy fields with white wildflowers on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open prairie landscape. A large rock outcropping dominates the right side while a tall deciduous tree stands on the left. The path winds through grassy meadows dotted with white wildflowers under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: group of mounted riders approaches from behind and passes on the right side
character raises right hand to tip hat at the passing riders

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while acknowledging passing riders with a hat tip gesture

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse galloping past from right to left
second rider on horse following closely behind the first

entered.detail: small red structure visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character walks, several riders on horseback suddenly appear from the right and gallop past along the trail. The character tips his hat in greeting as they pass. The large rock formation falls behind, and a distant red farm building becomes visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching rural farmstead with cultivated fields

events.description: red barn and farm buildings become clearly visible and grow larger ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the farm buildings visible in the distance

entered.detail: traditional red wooden barn with dark roof becoming visible ahead
weathered wooden fence posts marking field boundaries
rows of cultivated crops growing in the field to the left

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the trail as the landscape opens up to reveal a working farm ahead. A red barn building grows progressively larger in the center of the frame, while cultivated cornfields and wooden fencing appear on the left side of the path.

events.description: passing the farm buildings, wooden fence line becomes prominent on left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path past the farm area into more open countryside

entered.detail: thick grouping of green trees on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character passes the farm buildings, leaving the red barn behind on the left. A wooden fence line runs parallel to the path on the left side, while dense clusters of trees appear on the right. The trail continues through open prairie toward the distant horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from an open prairie landscape into a working farmstead. It begins with the character walking between a large rock outcropping and a tall deciduous tree, winding through grassy meadows dotted with white wildflowers. As several riders on horseback gallop past from the right, the rock formation recedes and a distant red farm building emerges on the horizon. The scene then opens up to reveal cultivated cornfields and wooden fencing as the red barn grows progressively larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera passes the farm buildings, leaving the barn behind on the left as the trail continues through open prairie toward the distant horizon.
